scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/editor-protocol/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/editor-browser/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/editor-forge-play/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/editor-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/editor-babylon/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/editor/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p examples/editor-lab/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p examples/babylon-editor-world/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:browser && npm run test:pack
scripts.check: npm run check:boundaries && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit
scripts.publish:next: npm run check && npm run build && npm publish --workspace @fps-games/editor --access public --tag next
